markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly sync between Aftershoot and GrowthX to discuss content strategy, performance, and next steps.](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX is working on fixing dashboard issues to provide better data visibility on content performance](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=6.0)
  - [There's a misalignment between current content approach (mostly TOFU) and Aftershoot's goals; need to shift focus to more product-aligned, mid/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [Content quality and relevance issues need to be addressed before expanding to new content areas](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=126.0)
  - [New keyword research and content strategy to be developed collaboratively, focusing on photographer pain points and product alignment](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=191.0)

## Topics

### Dashboard and Data Issues

  - [GrowthX is fixing connector issues between Airtable content OS and Looker dashboard](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=339.0)
  - [Aftershoot team requests access to more comprehensive data, including GA4, to better understand content performance](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=389.0)

### Content Performance Analysis

  - [Overall blog CTR is low, with average position on 2nd/3rd pages (rank 13-16)](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=525.0)
  - [AI overviews are impacting click-through rates, especially for top-of-funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=624.0)
  - [Need to analyze user intent and engagement metrics to determine content refresh strategy](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=697.0)

### Content Strategy Shift

  - [GrowthX proposes moving from purely TOFU to more mid/bottom funnel content](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [New approach includes interviewing photographers, creating case studies, and developing thought leadership pieces](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1434.0)
  - [Focus on pain points Aftershoot solves rather than general photography topics](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1408.0)
  - [Aftershoot team emphasizes need to align new strategy with current contract scope and address existing content quality issues first](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1620.0)

### Content Quality and Alignment

  - [Current content described as "dry informational pieces" lacking narrative or value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Need to improve product and audience alignment in content](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)
  - [Incorporate feedback on content quality and ensure each piece speaks to core value proposition](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1774.0)

### Keyword Research and Content Planning

  - [Aftershoot's SEO lead (Meenakshi) is working on new keyword research](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2127.0)
  - [Collaborate on making complex topics more accessible while maintaining intent alignment](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on improving content quality, engagement, and product-market alignment](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)

### Artifacts and Outlines

  - [GrowthX is refreshing and improving content artifacts](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Previous outlines shared were not satisfactory; new templates and approach to be developed](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GrowthX to provide more comprehensive data analysis, including GA4 insights if possible](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=743.0)
  - [Collaborate on new keyword research and content strategy development](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [GrowthX to review past feedback and comments on content issues](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2203.0)
  - [Aftershoot to share preferred outline template for future content](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2393.0)
  - [GrowthX to focus on improving content quality and product-market alignment](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2162.0)
  - [Continue async communication to address action items before next meeting](https://fathom.video/share/fLDHtqw-cT6N_RPHfv6LLqwWsiR3GbJo?tab=summary&timestamp=2473.0)
